name: Potency Crystal (Major)
description:
Activate (Free Action) (concentrate)

Trigger You make an attack with the affixed weapon, but you haven't rolled yet

This fluorite crystal glows with a strange phosphorescence. When you activate the crystal, the weapon becomes a +3 major striking weapon on the Strike and until the end of this turn, gaining a +3 item bonus to the attack roll and increasing the damage to four weapon damage dice.

Effect: Potency Crystal
